description: Healthcare VC focused on Medicaid-heavy populations and structurally underserved patients. Invests in post-revenue healthcare companies with compelling data strategies.
Early-stage fund focused on digital health and vertical AI applications. Launched March 2025 with ~$300M deployed and $200M+ remaining. Strong SaaS and healthcare AI thesis.
Mental and behavioral health seed-stage VC. 10+ years backing mental health winners (early investors in Calm and BetterUp). Focus on behavioral health, brain health, and wellness.
Health equity VC investing in health tech for historically underserved communities. Focus areas include Medicaid/Medicare beneficiaries, behavioral health, value-based care tech.
Post-acute investment firm specializing in home health, hospice, assisted living, and healthcare technology. 18 years of healthcare industry leadership in post-acute care.
Health tech VC investing in home-based care, remote care, care coordination, aging in place, and caregiver support. Backed by SE Health with 117 years of healthcare experience.
Pioneering digital health venture fund investing at the intersection of healthcare and technology. Apply via rockhealth.com/join-our-portfolio. Leading digital health research org.
Seed-stage VC dedicated to AI in healthcare. Focus areas include ML for diagnosis, digital pathology, and healthcare accessibility. Hands-on partnership model with 50+ years collective experience.

Early-stage investor in vertical applied-AI and healthcare innovation. Portfolio includes Eo-Vision (clinician decision-support) and Ethermed (prior authorization). Focus on AI embedded in real workflows.
Operator-led PE fund for AI transformation of healthcare. Led by former Kaiser Permanente CAIO and Change Healthcare M&A exec. Deep healthcare AI deployment expertise.
Specializes in Healthcare AI and Bioscience investing. $100M+ invested across 10+ companies. Focus on precision medicine, AI-native workflows, and healthcare data platforms.
HealthTech and MedTech focused VC. Founded 2020 with 12 portfolio companies. Partners bring 70+ years combined experience in medical technologies, law, and entrepreneurship.
HealthTech VC affiliated with Sheba Medical Center (Newsweek World's Best Hospitals). Provides access to hospital data, clinical studies, and global provider connections.
Healthcare-focused fund backed by Blue Cross Blue Shield companies. Invests in technology & operations, healthcare services, and clinical sciences. Deep payor contracting expertise.
Operator-led healthcare investment firm. Focus on post-acute, behavioral, virtual, and diagnostic care. $50M+ collected, 200+ facilities managed. 100% operator-led approach.
Operator-led MedTech VC fund focusing on AI-MedTech, surgical robotics, and remote patient monitoring. Provides strategic guidance and operational support post-investment.
Healthcare angel group with 400+ combined years in health and tech. Portfolio includes AI clinical trial recruitment, healthcare admin tech, and medical robotics startups.
Meharry Medical College's healthcare VC fund. Invests in health IT, AI, diagnostics, genomics, and primary/preventive care. Purpose-built for health equity investments.
Nashville-based VC investing in early-stage healthcare services and digital health. Roots in HCA family office. 16 investments, 3 exits. Has 'Pitch Us' portal.
National leader in strategic venture investing in healthcare for 25+ years. 67+ portfolio companies including Abridge, DexCare, Omada Health. Diagnostics, digital health, health IT.
CVS Health's $100M corporate VC platform. Focus on consumer-centric health, whole person care, and transforming care delivery. Portfolio includes Abridge, AbsoluteCare, Maven.
VC arm of Intermountain Health. Invests in care site optimization, workforce transformation, consumer experience, and clinical advancement. Access to integrated health system for testing.
Top-tier VC actively investing in healthcare AI. Backed Anterior (clinical workflow AI). Recognizes $300B healthcare admin operations as ripe for AI disruption. Apply via website.
Growth equity firm managing $5.3B+ in healthcare and fintech. 100+ portfolio investments, 39 companies valued at $1B+. Deep healthcare technology expertise.
Operator-led investment firm targeting the $83B senior care market (projected $115B by 2028). Focus on operational improvement and technology for senior care businesses.
Healthcare VC managing the Catalyst Health Fund. Focus on alternative care models, tech-enabled health and AI, precision medicine. Led by clinicians and operators.
Longevity-focused VC with top 1% historical fund performance. Early-stage therapeutics, healthcare, and technology. 75% healthcare investments, 31% at seed stage.
Early-stage VC focused on Healthtech, Techbio, and Healthspan Extension startups. Invests in companies advancing longevity and wellness tech.
Seattle-based early-stage investment fund. Located at WRF Venture Center. Invests in Pacific Northwest startups including healthcare and technology.
Deep Health VC focused on early-stage ventures. Invests in first or second institutional rounds (before $50M valuation). Seeks at least 5% ownership. Can lead or co-lead.
Pre-seed fund with 300 portfolio companies in 30 countries. Healthcare portfolio includes Adonis (AI-driven revenue cycle management). Co-founded by Jenny Fielding and Scott Hartley.
Seed-stage VC investing with conviction and speed. Based in Detroit with NYC presence. Backed Keebler Health (AI risk adjustment for value-based care). Founded 2009.
Early-stage life science and healthcare VC since 2002. Focus on biopharmaceutical therapeutics, platform technologies, and products with shorter development cycles.
Seed-stage VC. David Bill (CTO) focuses on digital health, digital therapeutics, and ML/AI in healthcare. Led seed in Keebler Health (AI for healthcare coding).
$17B AUM healthcare-focused VC. One of the world's largest healthcare investment firms. Invests globally across digital health and biotech. 100+ professionals.
Early-stage VC since 1986 focused on life science discoveries to prevent, detect, and cure disease. Offices in Chicago, Seattle, SF, Austin, LA.
$2.4B under management in biotech and healthcare. 70+ successful acquisitions/IPOs. Seeds ~half of portfolio companies from scratch. Operates own discovery labs.
GovTech and Health IT venture studio. Founded by former CEO of HCI Group (largest healthcare IT consulting firm). Focus on Health IT, Digital Health, and GovTech in Southeast US.
VC investing in healthcare IT and tech-enabled service businesses. Founded 2015 with 33 portfolio companies across healthcare, enterprise apps, and life sciences.
Top-tier VC with active Health IT investing. John Lilly (Venture Partner) has $25M sweet spot. Active in seed through Series B across Health IT and SaaS.

UnitedHealth Group's venture arm. Invests in healthcare innovation across care delivery, clinical operations, and health IT. One of the largest health system strategic investors.
Healthcare-focused VC. Co-led $30M seed round for Qualified Health (generative AI infrastructure for healthcare). Active in healthcare AI infrastructure investments.
Seed-stage fund backing visionary founders in technology and science. Portfolio includes Uber, Coinbase, Perplexity, and Color (healthcare genomics).
Global VC firm active in digital health from pre-seed to growth. Known for backing disruptive SaaS and healthcare tech companies.
Co-led Abridge's $250M Series D for AI clinical documentation. Active in healthcare AI and enterprise SaaS investing since 1980.
LA-based VC. Led Keragon's $7.5M seed round (HIPAA-compliant healthcare automation). Active in healthcare SaaS and workflow automation investments.
Seed-stage fund co-invested in Zingage ($12.5M for AI home care platform). Active in consumer tech and healthcare AI investments.
Founded by Jeffrey Katzenberg. Co-invested in Zingage ($12.5M for AI home care platform). Focus on media, technology, and healthcare innovation.
Community fund for founders exploring new ideas. Co-invested in Zingage (AI home care) and active in healthcare AI seed deals.
Led $4.3M seed round for Ember (automated medical coding and denial prevention). Active in healthcare AI and enterprise software investing.
European VC that led seed round for Noteless (AI clinical documentation). Active in healthcare AI and enterprise automation investments.
Invested in Anterior (clinical workflow AI for healthcare). Long-term growth investor in healthcare technology and digital health.
Backed Anterior (clinical workflow automation for health insurers). Focus on enterprise software and healthcare AI.
Manages the XBV Healthcare Fund. Focused on healthcare innovation and technology-enabled health services.
Invests in early-stage healthcare solutions across health technologies & services, life sciences, and animal health. Located at 11 Times Square.
Co-founded by VC pioneer Alan Patricof. Focus on aging-related healthcare, financial services, and consumer products. Seed to Series A investments.

location: Los Angeles, CA / San Francisco, CA
description: Seed-stage VC since 2016. 120+ seed investments representing $125B aggregate market cap. Helps companies achieve product-market fit and follow-on financing.

Prolific angel/seed investor. Co-led Abridge's $250M Series D (AI clinical documentation). Former VP at Twitter, active in healthcare AI and enterprise SaaS seed deals.
Led pre-seed in Alto Technologies (home care marketplace that reduces care costs by 40%). Active in healthcare and aging technology investments.
Launched €25M second fund in 2026. Supports AI-enabled software startups from inception through pre-seed. Focus on enterprise SaaS and healthcare AI.

Backs B2B SaaS healthcare AI founders focused on clinical workflows, operations, and real-world impact. Emphasis on data-rich, clinically integrated, operationally scalable solutions.
